case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY & COUNTY OF SF VS. SHIRLEY J. JACKSON

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,153.00 FILED BY HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY & COUNTY OF SF (SAN FRANCISCO) AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, SHIRLEY J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-21-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-20-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-21-2021 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY & COUNTY OF SF (SAN FRANCISCO)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-14-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-06-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY & COUNTY OF SF IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ROSALBA FERRELL SENIOR COLLECTIONS OFFICER. DEFENDANT SHIRLEY JACKSON IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR FULL DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-20-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO OCT-14-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 TO ALLOW FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF CCSF, REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH QUARTELL, COLLECTION SERVICE MANAGER CALLS THE COURT ON THE DAY OF THE SCHEDULED TRIAL DATE AND MAKES AN ORAL REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT SHIRLEY J. JACKSON IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
